stemHtml: Which of these options is the basic definition of Required Navigation Performance (RNP)?

options.a: A statement of the navigation performance required when installing a new navigation aid on the ground.
options.b: A statement of the navigation performance necessary for operation within a defined airspace.
options.c: A statement of the navigation performance necessary during flight tests for a new aircraft type.
options.d: A statement of the navigation performance required during a pilot skill test.
